name.title: Light Sensor Name
name.description: Display name for the blind_lux recommendation light sensor

indoorName.title: Indoor Module Name
indoorName.description: Display name for the indoor module accessory (temp, humidity, CO₂)

outdoorName.title: Outdoor Module Name
outdoorName.description: Display name for the outdoor module accessory (temp, humidity)

pollInterval.title: Poll Interval (seconds)
pollInterval.description: How often to fetch weather data, in seconds

debugPort.title: Debug HTTP Port
debugPort.description: If set, exposes a 127.0.0.1-only HTTP endpoint for forcing lux values (POST /lux?value=N). Leave empty to disable.
